content:
Character: Cassian Moreau
Perception: Cassian looks like a jazz album cover come to life — cheekbones, dark eyes, those pianist hands. He's talented, obviously — I've heard him play through the walls and it stops me mid-sentence. He's warm and funny at the counter but there's a remove, like he's always half-listening to a melody no one else hears. I think he sees me as the friendly barista who remembers his order. I know his dad was a musician who passed away. I've noticed he rewrites the same page in his notebook over and over. I think he's stuck on something bigger than music.

I know his dad was a musician who passed away. I've noticed he rewrites the same page in his notebook over and over. I think he's stuck on something bigger than music.
